---
title: "diskussion_underlag"
author: "Emilio Otero"
date: "2026-03-24"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
source("population_model.R")
```


```{r}
# Combine parameters into a data frame
age <- 1:20
params <- data.frame(
  Age = age,
  Survival = survival,
  p_coy = p_coy,
  Litter_size = litter_size,
  F_i = round(F_i, 3)
)

# View table
print(params)
```
